testcase.name: resolver matches cleanup responsibility contract and blocks without current evidence
resolver passes matched contract when current-head evidence is bound to required observations
resolver accepts verify-record git context and observed values as current responsibility evidence
resolver does not satisfy contract evidence with unrelated generic unit pass
resolver accepts generic current unit evidence for read-only audit reporting responsibilities
resolver emits no_registered_authority for unregistered high-risk state surfaces
resolver does not classify derive-only workspace status as an unregistered state responsibility
resolver fails closed when workspace status contains a state mutation
resolver applies workspace status exemption without hiding unregistered CLI wiring
resolver retains a mixed worker candidate beside read-only workspace status
resolver fails closed when reviewed workspace status gains an indirect git side effect
resolver keeps no_registered_authority for mixed matched and unregistered high-risk paths
resolver fails closed when matched registry entry is missing required fields
resolver fails closed on malformed responsibility registry JSON
root registry resolves VibePro core responsibility authorities with contract-bound evidence
resolver does not fan out a shared risk surface across path-anchored responsibilities
resolver preserves standalone risk matching for an explicitly risk-only responsibility
resolver lets a contract clause path supplement a non-matching registry path
resolver matches symbols only in changed production lines
resolver matches a symbol added on a changed production line
resolver fails closed for symbol matching when the production diff cannot be read
resolver fails closed for symbol matching when no diff base is provided
resolver compares an explicit head even when another branch is checked out
resolver matches a symbol in an untracked production file
resolver ignores registered symbols that appear only in test files or story text
resolver does not match a contract from responsibility reference alone
pr prepare keeps shared-risk authority matching precise through Gate DAG and Requirement synthesis
session efficiency audit uses process-manager worktree and Codex token_count window
session efficiency audit estimates audit artifact token exposure from Codex transcript entries
SCCB-SCENARIO-001 compaction replacement_history text is bucketed as replayed_context, not audit_evidence/test
SEXP-S-1/2/3/4 classifies provenance, preserves semantic totals, and deduplicates repeated mixed tool output by digest
session efficiency audit infers the matching Codex session from repo cwd and window
SCATTR-SCENARIO-001 session inference merges split JSONL files for the same session id
SCATTR-SCENARIO-001 session inference ignores symlink directories during JSONL discovery
SCATTR-SCENARIO-001 session inference bounds discovery to the selected window day directories
SCATTR-SCENARIO-002 session cwd from sibling Git worktree still matches canonical repo
SCATTR-SCENARIO-005 worktree cwd match alone is decisive even without other signals
SCATTR-SCENARIO-006 cwd under a different repo worktree directory does not match
SCATTR-SCENARIO-003 explicit session from another repo remains partial with cwd mismatch
SCATTR-SCENARIO-004 bounded session window with no events keeps elapsed unavailable
SAI-SCENARIO-002 session inference keeps equal top candidates ambiguous without silent selection
SAI-SCENARIO-003 session inference keeps low-confidence candidates unavailable
audit session-cost CLI exposes JSON contract for active session cost audits
AUTCOST-SCENARIO-001 AUTCOST-SCENARIO-003 AUTCOST-SCENARIO-004 AUTCOST-SCENARIO-005 session efficiency audit uses automation memory daily window when explicit bounds are absent
AIL-SCENARIO-002 session efficiency audit uses readable detached story artifacts observed in Codex JSONL
AIL-SCENARIO-003 session efficiency audit reports observed detached artifacts when temp root is gone
audit memory preflight blocks missing memory unless fallback is explicit and commit readback verifies the window
audit memory preflight reports corrupt memory and CLI exits non-zero without fallback
session efficiency audit makes strict attribution primary and degrades mixed-parent readiness
session efficiency audit applies high risk only to strict-over-associated threshold breach
session efficiency audit keeps unavailable attribution explicit when inference selects no session
PR preparation session boundary is advisory and delegates mixed-session detection to session-cost
